title: Festive Fig Stir Fry
description: A sweet and savory stir fry with figs and a creamy sauce, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add stir-fry mix and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add figs and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in creamy sauce and soy sauce (if using).
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with sesame seeds and chopped scallions (optional).
Prepare the creamy sauce by mixing together mayonnaise, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
